creator: thomas.e.zander@googlemail.com
text:
When trying do download files from various sites, chromium crashes right after clicking on the download link at the point where one would expect a file chooser window to open. Easily reproducible on Google+ when trying to download an image via "Download image full size" in an image gallery.

I believe this is due to my recent switch of building chromium with clang instead of gcc4.6.

How-To-Repeat: 1) Build chromium with clang
2) Visit Google+
3) Visit some public image gallery on G+
4) Find some image that has a "Download full image" link in its options
5) Click on it -> Crash
